scenario: Impersonation attempt without valid rotation proof
description: Agent B presents Agent A's DID without a valid rotation chain. Expected: identity rejected at APS signature verification layer. Trust evaluation does not run. Existing A-delegator relationship state unchanged.

rotation.signature_verification_failure_reason: new_kid not signed by previous_kid; no chain link.

expected.identity_verdict_reason: Rotation signature does not verify against the claimed previous key. Request rejected at the cryptographic layer before trust evaluation runs.
expected.trust_after_handoff_note: Unchanged. The impersonation attempt does not touch the legitimate A-delegator relationship state.

side_effects.recommended_delegator_action: Alert legitimate Agent A via out-of-band channel. Consider proactive rotation if claimant demonstrates knowledge of internal identifiers.

aip13_delegationChain.note: Delegation chain evaluation does not run. Impersonation fails at APS signature layer before delegationChain resolution.

erc8004_keyRotation.note: Failed rotation attempts are not anchored on-chain; only successful rotations. Audit trail stays local to the verifier.
